location: Inside a chest at the top of the Forest Lookout Tower, a ruined tower over a cliff edge southwest of the Bridge of Sacrifice.
tactics: From Bridge of Sacrifice grace, head south past a sacked caravan to a fork, then north to reach the tower
Enter through a broken stone-wall gap at the base and climb the interior ladder
An archer/soldier enemy guards the top platform — expect ranged harassment on the way up
The chest holds the Hand Ballista plus 5 Ballista Bolts — grab both, the weapon is useless without ammo
lore: A crude siege weapon repurposed for solo use — a portable castle-breaker better suited to reckless one-man assaults than tactical warfare.

builds.name: Any build (utility)
builds.why: Zero stat scaling — just STR/DEX requirements to wield — so it fits any build as a heavy-hitting, guard-breaking sidearm against tough single enemies rather than a primary scaling weapon
